'''Laskar''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who occupied a place of high prestige on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tirahnn/Legends|Tirahnn]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. Once a small-time thief and a fence for stolen goods, Laskar eventually accrued a large fortune and influence on Tirahnn, and moved into a tower in the upper-crust community known as [[the Heights]]. Although by [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] he thought he had put the past behind him, he received a shock when [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]—whom Laskar still owed a large amount of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|money]] to—broke into his home one night. Although Laskar desperately offered to pay his debt to Solo, the smuggler was only after information on [[Kharys]], the [[Magister of Skye|Majestrix of Skye]], which Laskar provided.<ref name="hunt" />

==Behind the scenes==
Laskar appeared in [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 1]], written by [[Chris Claremont]] and released in [[1979]]. In the issue, Laskar was illustrated by [[Mike Vosburg]].<ref name="hunt" />
